    C

    clsActor - Class in org.example
    Represents an actor in the system, extending the base person information with actor-specific details and functionality.
    clsActor() - Constructor for class org.example.clsActor
    Default constructor that creates an empty Actor object.
    clsActor(int, int, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class org.example.clsActor
    Parameterized constructor that creates an Actor object with specified values.
    clsCast - Class in org.example
    Represents a cast member in a movie, linking an actor to a specific role in a film.
    clsCast() - Constructor for class org.example.clsCast
    Default constructor that creates an empty Cast object.
    clsCast(int, int, int, String) - Constructor for class org.example.clsCast
    Parameterized constructor that creates a Cast object with specified values.
    clsFavouriteActor - Class in org.example
    Represents a user's favorite actor relationship in the system.
    clsFavouriteActor() - Constructor for class org.example.clsFavouriteActor
    Default constructor that creates an empty FavouriteActor object.
    clsFavouriteActor(int, int, int) - Constructor for class org.example.clsFavouriteActor
    Parameterized constructor that creates a FavouriteActor object with specified values.
    clsFavouriteMovie - Class in org.example
    Represents a user's favorite movie relationship in the system.

    Default constructor that creates an empty FavouriteMovie object.

    Represents a movie genre in the system.

    Default constructor that creates an empty Genre object.
    clsGenre(int, String) - Constructor for class org.example.clsGenre

    clsMovie - Class in org.example
    Represents a movie in the system.

    clsPerson - Class in org.example
    Represents a person in the system with basic personal information.

    Default constructor that creates an empty Person object.
    clsPerson(int, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class org.example.clsPerson

    clsUser - Class in org.example
    Represents a user in the system, extending the base person information with user-specific details and contact information.

    Default constructor that creates an empty User object.
